chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-605 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Mr. Gulfam Ali, Advocate for Petitioners a/w Petitioners. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State a/w PDSP Khadim Hussain Narejo on behalf of SSP, Jamshoro and ASI Kashif Ali Mangi on behalf of SHO PS Kotri. ***************************************** An officials present on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and SHO PS Kotri have filed their reports / comments respectively, which are taken on record and undertake to provide legal protection to the Petitioners as and when required. Learned A.P.G present in Court submits that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect proceedings already pending against the Petitioners before the competent Court(s) of law. JUDGE Ali.
